name: Popcorn
recipeIngredient: Sloppy hot dog or hamburger seasoning mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow the package instructions to pop the corn.
2. Divide the popped corn in half and reserve the remaining portion for future use.
3. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon of your chosen seasoning mix over the popped corn you plan to serve.
4. Gently shake or toss with a fork to coat evenly.
5. Serve as desired.
Yield: 4 cups
Serving size: 1 cup
Exchange: 1 bread exchange
Calories: 65 per serving
